name: Portfolio Sizing & Risk Controls
description: Applies rigorous Kelly criteria and HMM volatility multipliers to calculate optimal position sizes and manage concentration boundaries.

tools.name: calculate_kelly_size
tools.description: Computes recommended position sizing based on trade confidence, asset price, and current volatility regime.

ticker.description: Target ticker symbol, e.g. SOL, BTC, ETH.

regime.description: Current HMM volatility regime label: LOW_VOLATILITY, HIGH_TREND_VOLATILITY, ERRATIC_VOLATILITY.
